_doc: Every <button>, [role="button"], and <a role="button"> in app/templates/ must
either carry one of `allowed_primitive_classes` OR match one of `exceptions[].selector`.
Exceptions document surfaces whose button classes fall outside the
Keep this list minimal — add a selector only when a surface has a deliberate reason to opt out.

exceptions.note: Desktop rail primary nav — legacy class family
Desktop rail collapsible section headers — legacy class family
Desktop rail collapse toggle — legacy class family
Tab bar scroll arrows — legacy class family
Terminal bar chrome toggles (search / ln / ts) — legacy class family
History panel action buttons — legacy class family
Mobile recents sheet 'delete all' button — legacy class family
Mobile recents filter rows (toggle / dropdown / check / clear) — legacy class family
Mobile hamburger menu items — legacy class family
Mobile hamburger menu sub-items (timestamp modes) — legacy class family
Mobile recent-peek strip (role=button div) — legacy class family
Mobile sheet grab handle (role=button div) — legacy class family
Desktop header toolbar buttons (classless, styled by id)
Mobile hamburger trigger (classless, styled by id)
Mobile composer run/kill (classless, styled by id)
Tab bar new-tab trigger (classless, styled by id)
Search nav arrows (classless, styled by id)
Hidden fallback run button (tabindex=-1, aria-hidden)
Mobile composer edit bar (classless, data-attr selected)
Sheet dropdown options inside .sheet-filter-dropdown
Permalink save-menu items (save-txt / save-html / save-pdf)
